company.title: Katapult Games
company.description: Katapult Games is a small video game studio based in Berlin, Germany. The team is developing Squad Dunk, a first-person, physics-based basketball game focused on online team play, readable action, and playful sports energy.
company.history: Katapult Games is building Squad Dunk around the feeling of being physically present on the court. The project focuses on first-person play, physics-based interaction, and team cooperation, aiming to make basketball feel immediate, social, and readable without becoming a strict simulation.
